item.title: Union Bank of India Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Apr 2026
item.description: Union Bank of India’s shares declined sharply on 23 Apr 2026, hitting an intraday low of Rs 185.5 as the stock faced notable price pressure, underperforming its sector and broader market indices amid a generally bearish trading session. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Bijlee Ltd Surges 7.37% to Day's High of Rs 3014 — Outperforms Sector by 5.48 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.96% on 23 Apr 2026, while Bharat Bijlee Ltd surged 7.37%, marking a striking 5.48-percentage-point outperformance over its sector. This sharp single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the small-cap electrical equipment player, raising the question of whether this is a breakout or a recovery rally within a broader trend. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rhetan TMT Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 28.5
item.description: Surging past its previous peak, Rhetan TMT Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 28.5 on 23 Apr 2026, marking a 53.15% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined 3.01% in the same period. This milestone caps a three-day rally that has propelled the stock 11.56% higher, underscoring robust momentum driven by a confluence of technical factors. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kingfa Science & Technology (India) Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 4990
item.description: With a remarkable ascent from Rs 2,451 to Rs 4,990 over the past year, Kingfa Science & Technology (India) Ltd has surged 57.21%, significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined by 3.01% during the same period. This fresh 52-week high, reached on 23 Apr 2026, underscores the stock’s robust momentum amid a broader market environment that remains subdued. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Kingfa Science & Technology Hits All-Time High of Rs 4,928 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its winning streak to three sessions, Kingfa Science & Technology (India) Ltd surged 2.46% on 23 Apr 2026 to close near its 52-week high at Rs 4,928.20, outpacing the Sensex which declined 0.87% on the day. This fresh peak caps a remarkable run that has seen the stock rally nearly 59% over the past year, significantly outperforming the broader market indices. Time: 38 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Rhetan TMT Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Rhetan TMT Ltd, a player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price of Rs 28.39 on 23 Apr 2026, marking a notable achievement in its market journey. Time: 41 minutes ago

item.title: Azad Engineering Ltd Surges 7.82% to Day's High of Rs 2095.75 — Outperforms Sector by 8.41 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined 0.84% on 23 Apr 2026, Azad Engineering Ltd surged 7.82%, touching a new 52-week high of Rs 2095.75. This 8.41 percentage-point outperformance over its Heavy Electrical Equipment sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: ADF Foods Ltd Surges 7.33% to Day's High of Rs 252.65 — Outperforms FMCG Sector by 7.63 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.84% on 23 Apr 2026, while ADF Foods Ltd surged 7.33%, outperforming its FMCG sector peers by 7.63 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: SEPC Ltd Surges 7.21% to Day's High — Outperforms Construction Sector by 5.9 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.84% on 23 Apr 2026, while SEPC Ltd surged 7.21%, outperforming its sector by nearly six percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Hero MotoCorp Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Apr 2026
item.description: Hero MotoCorp Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 5,043, reflecting persistent price pressure amid broader market weakness. The stock underperformed its sector and key indices, continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen a cumulative fall of 4.4%. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Delta Corp Ltd. Surges 12.99% to Day's High of Rs 75 — Outperforms Sector by 11.62 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.83% on 23 Apr 2026 while Delta Corp Ltd. surged 12.99%, marking a striking 11.62-percentage-point outperformance over its Leisure Services sector peers. This sharp intraday rally, reaching a high of Rs 75, stands out amid a broadly weak market and a sector that fell by 2.21%, signalling a distinctly stock-specific event. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 339 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 339 on 23 Apr 2026, Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex. The stock’s 37.51% gain over the past 12 trading sessions underscores a sustained rally fuelled by robust technical indicators and steady fundamental growth. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kartik Investments Trust Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 4921.25
item.description: Surging past Rs 4,900, Kartik Investments Trust Ltd has reached a new 52-week high of Rs 4921.25 on 23 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable rally that has more than quadrupled its share price from the 52-week low of Rs 987. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained gains over the past 15 trading sessions. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: Azad Engineering Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 2,061.4 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Azad Engineering Ltd, a key player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, achieved a significant milestone on 23 April 2026 by reaching its all-time high stock price of Rs. 2,061.4. This marks a notable moment in the company’s market journey, reflecting strong performance and positive momentum in recent trading sessions. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd experienced a notable decline today, hitting an intraday low of Rs 1826.1, reflecting a 3.11% drop as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid prevailing negative sentiment. Time: 57 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Ltd Surges 3.1% to Day's High of Rs 1229.7 — Outperforms Sector by 2.91 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.91% on 23 Apr 2026, Adani Green Energy Ltd rose 3.1%, marking a notable outperformance of nearly 3 percentage points over its Power sector peers. This single-session surge rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which also touched a new 52-week high of Rs 1229.7 during the day. Time: 58 minutes ago

item.title: Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd Surges 7.33% to Day's High of Rs 2069.95 — Outperforms Sector by 7.02 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.89% on 23 Apr 2026, while Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd surged 7.33%, marking a notable outperformance of 7.02 percentage points over its sector. This sharp intraday gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which has been on a two-day winning streak, raising questions about the sustainability of this momentum. Time: 58 minutes ago

item.title: Praj Industries Ltd Surges 8.05% to Day's High of Rs 403.45 — Outperforms Sector by 4.34 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.89% on 23 Apr 2026, yet Praj Industries Ltd surged 8.05%, outperforming its sector by 4.34 percentage points. This strong single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 58 minutes ago

item.title: Mankind Pharma Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Mankind Pharma Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The pharmaceutical mid-cap stock has outperformed its sector peers, registering a 3.41% gain on 23 Apr 2026, supported by a 21.5% increase in open interest and sustained volume growth, reflecting renewed bullish sentiment despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Sell. Time: 58 minutes ago

item.title: Piramal Pharma Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Piramal Pharma Ltd (PPLPHARMA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by robust volume and rising investor participation, suggesting a potential directional bias emerging in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology space. Time: 58 minutes ago
